2022-23 UNC Tar Heels Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 20-13 (11-9, 7th in ACC MBB)

Coach: Hubert Davis

PS/G: 76.2 (71st of 363)

PA/G: 70.9 (204th of 363)

SRS: 12.94 (42nd of 363)

SOS: 7.66 (50th of 363)

ORtg: 107.8 (93rd of 363)

DRtg: 100.3 (130th of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +900
